# Kamnuanlek.com (คำนวณเลข) — Complete URL Inventory
# Thai-language financial, tax, salary, utility, and health calculators
# All rates sourced from Thai government agencies, updated for 2569 (2026 CE)

## Homepage
https://www.kamnuanlek.com/
